note: Canonical specification of the Mayfly agent<->helper IPC. LOCAL Unix Domain Socket protocol, NOT a network wire protocol. Owned by mayfly-helper; consumed by mayfly-agent. See docs/ADR-0008 and docs/ADR-0009.

impl.consumer: mayfly-agent repo: src/ipc/{protocol.rs,client.rs} (byte-identical copy of protocol.rs)

duplication: protocol.rs is duplicated byte-for-byte into mayfly-agent pending a shared crate (ADR-0009, BL-017).

framing.length_prefix: u32 big-endian byte length of the JSON body

authentication: socket file perms 0660 root:mayfly (OS-enforced: only root + mayfly group connect)
capability token: 32-byte random hex in /etc/mayfly-agent/helper.token (0640 root:mayfly), present in every request, compared constant-time
SO_PEERCRED uid pinning: planned hardening (BL-016), not yet enforced

request_schema.op: one of: Ping | EnsureDirectories | InstallSshdDropin | ApplyTrustedCaKeys | VerifyState
request_schema.content: string (ApplyTrustedCaKeys only): the full rendered TrustedUserCAKeys file body

response_schema.outcome: string enum: ok | applied | rolled_back | not_modified | unhealthy
response_schema.detail: string | null: fixed, non-sensitive reason; never a path/secret/token

operations.InstallSshdDropin: atomically write /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/90-mayfly.conf (TrustedUserCAKeys directive), detect missing Include, sshd -t, reload
operations.ApplyTrustedCaKeys: atomic replace of /etc/ssh/mayfly/trusted_user_ca_keys: validate content -> temp+fsync+rename -> sshd -t -> reload -> verify; rollback to previous on any failure
operations.VerifyState: verify drop-in + trusted-CA perms/ownership; sshd -t; sshd active

security_invariants: requests map 1:1 to explicit ops; NO generic filesystem API; NO arbitrary command op
helper never returns file contents, paths, tokens, or secrets in responses or logs
fail-closed: an apply that cannot be validated/reloaded rolls back; never leaves invalid sshd config
the only external programs the helper may execute are the fixed allow-list above (ADR-0008)
validation_rules: ApplyTrustedCaKeys content must re-parse as a valid TrustedUserCAKeys file before any write
change_policy: Wire changes bump version and update both the canonical copy here and the mayfly-agent consumer copy together.
